payload.answer: Requested inspection of memory mem_123. No underlying memory record is available in this context, so I cannot verify or present its contents. No new memory should be committed from this command alone.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an inspection command targeting an existing memory identifier, not a durable fact to store.

details: No memory backend or record contents were available.
